name: UmlautAdaptarrEX
description: UmlautAdaptarrEX presents itself to the *arrs as an indexer, sits between the *arrs and the real indexers, and corrects both searches and results so releases with umlauts or German titles are reliably found, downloaded and imported.

notes.text: Complete configuration via the web setup wizard at http://<IP>:5007/setup on first access.
Ports: 5007 = web UI + setup, 5005 = public API + indexer routes for the *arrs, 5006 = Prowlarr TCP proxy (requires basic auth set during setup).
RAM is set to 2048 MB to cover the in-container build; runtime needs only ~512 MB, so you may lower it to 1024 MB after the first successful build.
